name: director
description: Automated feature demo video production using Playwright E2E tests. Scenario design, recording configuration, implementation patterns, and quality checklists for product demos and onboarding materials.

capabilities.summary: Record feature demos with Playwright using storytelling pacing, one-Aha-moment framing, and reproducible settings
Audience-aware pacing, pain-first narrative, and Aha-moment focus with pre-recording scenario templates
slowMo, viewport, codecs, device profiles, browser.bind shared-session, and Chrome-for-Testing-aware config
page.screencast start/stop, showActions, showChapter, showOverlay, hideOverlays, and onFrame streaming for narrative overlays and annotations
Desktop, mobile, and tablet variants with viewport-specific settings and device presets
Realistic demo data plus storageState-based auth skipping for clean recordings
Echo-driven persona timing, typing cadence, and hesitation modeling
Convert Playwright Trace Viewer captures into presentable narrative recordings

recipes.label: Demo
recipes.when: Feature demo video recording and production

recipes.label: Voiceover
recipes.when: TTS narration design — SSML pacing, voice selection, LUFS normalization, breathing pauses

recipes.label: Captions
recipes.when: Caption authoring — SRT / WebVTT, WCAG 1.2.2 timing, forced / closed / open variants

recipes.label: Thumbnail
recipes.when: Per-platform thumbnail design (YouTube 1280×720, LinkedIn, X, Product Hunt) + A/B variants
